programme.desc: The lovebirds of the A-List experience some fireworks of a different kind. While Reichen tries to focus on other sources of income, Rodiney makes a shocking discovery on Reichen's phone.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens hit the streets of Hollywood to prank unsuspecting passers-by. RuPaul's extra special guest judges are funny lady Rachel Dratch and the world's first supermodel, Janice Dickinson.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: Legendary children Kady Z, Jillian Hervey and Kelly Osbourne join the queens to form All Star girl groups in a battle of the divas for the fiercest set. Rosie Perez and Mary Wilson of the Supremes guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The dolls make it rain when they compete as burlesque dancers at a hot Hollywood nightclub and weather an unexpected twist. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens split off into teams to film a country-fried commercial directed by Kathy Najimy who's joined on the panel by extra special guest judge country music legend Tanya Tucker. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The dolls compete in a star-studded tv game show where they must pull out their best celebrity impersonations. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Wedding bells ring as the queens go from blushing brides to dragzillas in a challenge that weds their drag personas with the perfect grooms...themselves. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens rock out on the main stage when they're challenged to sing live for the first time ever in RuPaul's Drag Race history. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The dolls must sell their tales as they pose for a book cover photoshoot and hit the press junket circuit. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens must transform a group of silver daddies into their drag mothers in this NYX Cosmetics challenge. They're joined by extra special guest judges Debbie Reynolds & Cloris Leachman and NYX Cosmetics founder Toni Ko. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A former friend threatens to come between Nia and Soulja Boy's relationship. Princess and Teairra's friendship leaves Ray J dazed and confused. Moniece goes under the gun for her new man. Milan wants Miles to move in but he can't let go of his old life.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: When Max leaves his wedding ring at home, Brandi wonders what he's hiding. Nas pops up on Soulja Boy and Nia decides to set her straight. Fizz decides to pump the brakes on his relationship with Kamiah. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Fizz rekindles his romance with Nikki, who has some parting words for Kamiah. Princess lays a trap to catch Teairra in her lies. Max and Brandi's marriage suffers a setback. Blogger Jason Lee pokes his nose into Fizz and Hazel's business.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Ray and Princess have a falling-out. Amber pressures Miles to make a move. Willie tries to launch his solo career while Shanda considers other ways to pay the bills. Rich's meeting with Moniece's mother goes left.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Princess calls Teairra on her false friendship. Willie tries to get out of his contract. Nikki and Brandi confront Jason and Kamiah. Miles invites Amber to sit down with a therapist.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Miles tells the truth to Amber and his family. Max and Brandi resolve their ring issues. Nia has had enough with Soulja's wandering eye. Teairra confronts Ray about his betrayal and considers surgical solutions to her personal problem.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Fizz reaches out to get some help raising his son. When Amber learns that Miles is with Milan, she wants to confront him about it. Hazel has an accident. Nia defends her relationship with Soulja to her father.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Willie tries to get out of his contract but Shanda takes matters into her own hands. Rich tries to play peacemaker between Moniece and her mother. Teairra goes in for surgery and Nikki worries if she'll be ready for their fashion show.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Willie finds out Shanda's been dancing again. Teairra looks like she won't be ready to walk the runway. Fizz wants to talk to Rich about his involvement in his family. Apryl asks Omarion about getting a turn in the spotlight.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Teairra stuns Nikki and Princess at the big fashion show. Moniece makes a big confession to Fizz. Ray J tries to get Princess back.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Rich confronts Moniece about her feelings for Fizz. Ray J has a surprise for Princess. Miles introduces Milan to his family and gets a mixed welcome. Moniece has choice words for Nikki after she spills the beans to Rich about Fizz. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Ray and Princess take the next steps toward their nuptials. Moniece and Brandi handle some unfinished business. Shanda and Willie's fairytale marriage hits a major snag. Fizz tries to persuade Nikki to move forward in the relationship.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: Shanda and Willie's marriage is rocked by a woman from Willie's past. Ray and Princess tackle the prenup controversy. Masika struggles to deal with paternity issues. Moniece stirs up trouble with Princess when she publicly spills tea about Ray.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Hollywood Series
programme.desc: A1 and Lyrica seemingly have the perfect relationship, but their opinionated mothers threaten the status quo. Princess confronts Moniece over her social media posts. Brandi tries to keep her secret from Max, but her plan blows up in her face.

programme.title: Borneo: Earth's Ancient Eden
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Coastal Africa
programme.desc: The African intertidal zone is home to a unique universe of plants and creatures; here, life has adapted to survive in a challenging marine environment; some species are able to live on exposed rocks, while others prefer the shelter of rock pools.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: Enter Brazil's Serra da Capivara at the beginning of the dry season as a troop of capuchin monkeys welcomes its newest member; explore the forest alongside the curious baby, who faces threats from predators, food shortages, and even the wild climate.

programme.title: Shetland's Otters
programme.desc: Discover the secrets of the shy, sweet otters that live in these remote islands.

programme.title: New Kids in the Wild
programme.desc: In India, Ravi the baby lion-tailed macaque faces life in a shrinking habitat and encroaching human world; Ravi has a caring mom, a protective dad, a playful sister and numerous, cousins, aunts and uncles all watching over him.

programme.title: Babies of the plains
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: Chasing the Rains
programme.desc: In Samburu, matriarch Anastasia turns her elephant herd north after a local river dries up; cheetah mom Kuleta evades a crafty pack of hyenas in Naboisho; checking in on wild dog Phoenix and her new litter in Laikipia.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: The large Manzi pack in the lush heartland, the Kakuli pack in the badlands and the tiny Stork colony pack living at the park's edge; Julz shares their victories and defeats.

programme.title: Wild Dogs: Running with the Pack
programme.desc: As the temperatures rise, the water is getting scarce; the Manzi pack must stand alongside predators to hydrate at a remaining precious water spot; Weka's pack feed the pups; the Stork colony thrive against all odds.

programme.title: Bears of the Karawank Mountains
programme.desc: Travelling across Slovenia's Alpine peaks.

programme.title: Webs & Wings: Nature's Tiny Ballet
programme.desc: Unlock the vital role these feared hunters and spinners play in Earth's ecology.

programme.title: Croc and Hippo Watch with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve gets a first-hand look at what makes Nile crocodiles so deadly and helps a team of scientists relocate a bunch of man-eaters.

programme.title: The Magic Circle of the Reef
programme.desc: The Coral Triangle reef is part of the so-called Ring of Fire, a 40,000 km volcanic belt that surrounds the land perimeter of the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Galapagos
programme.desc: Discover how scientists are working to restore and protect the Galapagos; witness penguin health checks, tortoise tagging and battles against invasive species, which are building a sustainable future for this delicate, one-of-a-kind ecosystem.

programme.title: Orangutan Jungle School
programme.desc: Bidding farewell to old friends and celebrating Molly and Bumi's big move.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has sent a notice declaring he will steal all the cash from every bank in Paris. Detective Melon, the granddaughter of Inspector Garimard, is chosen to catch Lupin alongside Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has many secret techniques up his sleeve, and one of them is his Levitation Technique. In order to get their hands on this technique, a crime syndicate plots a dirty trick, where a fake Lupin tortures a man known as X8 and frames the real Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Inspector Zenigata get kidnapped and the two are forcibly conscripted into the Foreign Legion in Morocco. Lupin and Inspector Zenigata make a run for it, but not before they're shackled together at the neck.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Beautiful Swedish twins, Latica and Anita, are engaged in a battle to the death over the Viking treasure map concealed on their backs. In disguise, Lupin learns the map's secret, but the map possesses an additional secret.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A hit has been ordered on Lupin and Puma, a formidable hitman who specializes in long-range attacks, is on his trail! Lupin takes his chances with a close range, one-on-one showdown against Puma, but the plan seemingly backfires and Lupin is shot…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Orion's Crown has been stolen and is up for grabs at a black-market auction. Lupin has his eyes on both the crown and the auction money, but first he must outsmart the other parties vying for the crown, including Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A two-thousand-year-old casket has been excavated. Inside the casket is Camilla, a beautiful woman in a near-death state, holding a golden statuette of the Virgin Mary. Lupin attempts to steal the golden statuette, but things don't go as planned…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang are attending a party in Africa, waiting for an opportunity to snatch a rare black pearl. However, their plan goes awry when a gang of gorillas crashes the party and steals the black pearl.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Massive riches have been hidden inside Tsukikage Castle. Lupin and his gang must decipher a code to find out the whereabouts of this great treasure. Wii Lupin be able to locate the treasure before his rivals do?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen head to Mongolia in search of Genghis Khan's treasures. Meanwhile, Goemon is visiting his ancestor's grave to pay his respects when he encounters Fujiko, who is in search of Yoshitsune Minamoto's buried treasure.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The ICPO chief promises to erase Fujiko's criminal record in exchange for her cooperation in arresting Lupin. Up against an ego-bruised Inspector Zenigata and a determined Fujiko, have Lupin's heisting days come to an end?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen sneak on board a ship smuggling diamonds. However, what they find on board are several thousand chickens! Lupin and his gang infiltrate the Hong Kong smuggling boss's lair where diamonds are being illicitly sold…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang steal a suitcase containing Costa Rican diamonds, but the contents turns out to be Inspector Zenigata. The real diamonds are being shipped to Puerto Rico inside a missile and Lupin must find out the precise launch time to intercept it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaguya, a beautiful woman, separately asks Lupin, Jigen and Goemon to gather the tears of the Yeti, a mermaid's scale, and the liver of a dragon so she can make a secret potion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A wealthy shipping magnate and also a bachelor, Onabes' final voyage is nothing short of extravagant, with a ship full of beautiful women and fine art. Things go as planned when Lupin infiltrates the ship disguised as a woman…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Hong Kong for a vacation when he is asked to find a woman in return for helping him escape from Inspector Zenigata. Lupin discovers the pickpocket who stole his wallet is the daughter of the woman he is looking for…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After several divorces and a couple of deceased husbands, Jacqueline has amassed a fortune and a collection of impressive jewels. In a twist of fate, Lupin and Jacqueline become close... Too close for Jigen and Goemon's comfort…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is reunited with Cornelia, a woman who died by her father's hands to save Lupin's life. However, Cornelia's memories of Lupin have been erased. Her father is Dr. Zel, a Nazi who has succeeded in resurrecting corpses and controlling them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko discovers that the Holy Scripture for Immortality is hidden within the jungles of Thailand. However, Emmanuelle Poirot, a cold-hearted beauty, is after them too.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Phantoma Mark III, grandson of the mysterious master thief and disguise artist Phantoma, who terrorized Europe during his heyday, is plotting to take over the world…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The aging Inspector Hanshichi Mikawa, who failed to capture Lupin 10 years ago, is viewed as a nuisance by his peers at the downtown police station. Lupin has announced he'll be stealing the golden Kannon statuette.

programme.title: Siesta Key
programme.desc: Juliette learns Alyssa took Alex back, while Alyssa finds out she's pregnant. Amanda and JJ argue over trust issues. Brandon reintroduces Camilla to the group, while Jared leaves his girlfriend alone with them.

programme.title: Siesta Key
programme.desc: Juliette is devastated when she learns Alyssa is pregnant. Chloe is stressed about running the Crescent Club. Brandon struggles to give up his dreams while Madisson starts to pursue hers.

programme.title: Siesta Key

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits pediatrician Dr. Jane Breck, who shows young viewers what might happen during a child's routine checkup. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Cousin Mary Owl plans a cousin reunion!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how children are curious about families that are formed by adoption and talks about his family's adoption of his own sister. He shows a film about different families in his Neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: The history of ice cream ranging from the gelato of Italy and a 19th-century French process to today's frozen desserts; visiting Dreyer's, TCBY and Joy Cone Co. factories; Ben & Jerry's flavor innovations.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A jealous suitor carries on a campaign of vindictive harassment until he is killed and Perry Mason's client is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Perry Mason

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Mason gets slapped by a beautiful blonde private eye and a short time later finds his client charged with murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A tiny limping canary convinces Perry Mason his client did not murder her husband though proving it in court is a monumental task.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason is challenged to solve a mystery involving a dead wife who sues for divorce, a lovely blonde who is not a sister in a sister act, a husband, and an ex-husband.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason is hired by George Clark to establish the fact that Lorna Thomas, a one-time famous actress, is his wife's real mother.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Steve Benton hires Perry Mason to help his brother Larry, who has been forging checks to pay off purported gambling debts.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A puzzling and contradictory case develops as Mason defends Mitsou Kamuri first against a charge of stealing some valuable rose pearls then against a charge of murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Jo Ann Blanchard seeks the help of Perry Mason when John Brant, a wealthy old man, takes her prize race horse as payment for a mortgage he holds on her property.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The rivalry between Richard Vanaman and Fred Petrie for an executive promotion in an investment firm involves Perry Mason.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A pretty model suspected of selling bathing suit designs to her employer's competition gets Mason involved in the results of greed and jealousy.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason is hired to defend Sarette Winslow, a woman accused of murdering a nephew who neglected his financial obligations towards her.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A worthless movie contract drives a glamour girl into hiding. Mason, asked to track her, finds more than he bargained for, including a love triangle and murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: When a young man just released from prison is accused of robbery and murder by the entire town, Mason changes his plans for a fishing holiday and takes charge of the case.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Florida, Mike and Frank visit a hangar-sized barn full of treasures, owned by a couple of junkyard junkies who've been picking since 1948. An awesome circus property turned animal preserve features lions, tigers, and bears.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys head to Michigan hoping to strike automotive gold in the heart of America's car capital. Clearing the contents of derelict storage lockers, Brian's sprawling auction house is a picker's playground.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: An 1861 Civil War saber finds its way into the shop--but if it's real, why was the blade never sharpened? Then Rick and the owner of a Chuck Berry autographed Fender guitar find themselves on different pages.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars look to buy a 1929 Chopped Ford Coupe but if they can't agree on a price, will the deal end up rusting in the bone yard? Then, a cowboy wants to sell his mechanical calf-roping machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick and the Old Man look to buy a 1965 Shelby Cobra classic car--one of the most expensive American race cars. Will they burn rubber and make a deal, or will they slam on the brakes for a fake?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When Rick and the Old Man buy an antique 19th Century wine-maker, Chumlee wants to put it into action. Will he succeed and brew a magnificent "Pawn Shop Pinot"?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Six weeks ago, three couples met at the altar and married as complete strangers. They were matched by experts, but now it's up to them to decide whether or not to continue their relationships. Will they stay married or opt for a divorce?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with a mysterious pocket-sized sundial believed to be from the 16th Century...complete with a concealed secret inside.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Sweet and Sour

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Bird Brains
programme.desc: The Cajun Pawns Stars chase down a deal on some mischievous peacocks.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Batter Up

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Pawn 'n Chain
programme.desc: Jimmie tries to lock down a price on an old Mississippi prison ball and chain.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Hoping to score big on the East Coast, Mike and Frank make stops in Virginia, DC, and Maryland, and are delirious when they find themselves waist-deep in a treasure-packed machine shop. Harry's property is wired for maximum security.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Burning up the back roads of South Dakota, Mike and Frank get off to a great start in Jim's spectacular man-cave. But when he slams on the brakes.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank think they've hit the lottery with Dick's North Carolina warehouse. It's jam-packed with quality stuff but his prices are through the roof.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, Mike and Frank pick in some unique places including a funeral home and a prosthetic limb factory.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With Frank too sick to go picking, Mike's brother Robbie scrambles to fill in at the last minute for the trip. In Idaho, the guys find a barn-sized man cave filled with an awesome collection of Western Americana.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys go big in Texas with a mega pick at the first Dr. Pepper bottling plant, and tough negotiations in a 50,000 square-foot warehouse.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, a secret agent, is framed for the deaths of his espionage team and attempts to flee government assassins after him. He races against the clock in order to discover the truth.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II

programme.title: Mission: Impossible III

programme.desc: Killua faces Shoot while Gon takes on Knuckle.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The Three Royal Guards kneel down to respectfully welcome the Chimera Ant King, but by doing so they signal the end of their allegiance to the Queen.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Colt surrenders and seeks the help of the extermination team to help the dying Queen.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: After losing to Knuckle and Shoot, Gon and Killua return home to Palm.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: While Gon is on his date with Palm, Killua encounters Rammot in the forest. Just when their battle is about to begin, Killua hears his brother's voice in his head, telling him to run away.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle and Morel appear to be overwhelmed by the speed of Cheetu's attacks, but they have a chance at victory.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Kalluto, Feitan, Shalnark, Phinks, Shizuku, and Bonolenov meet in Meteor City, the home of the Phantom Troupe. They have returned after getting the news that the Chimera Ant, Zazan, has built her nest in their city.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The members of the Phantom Troupe go to Zazan's nest to defeat her. The Troupe splits up to confront Zazan's minions individually. As they battle, each member of the Troupe reveals their secret ability.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua arrive in a village in East Gorteau but find no trace of the inhabitants.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: A pair of Chimera Ants appears and hunts Gon under the cover of night, overwhelming him with their attacks. Feeling that things are at a standstill, he gathers up his Nen and prepares to throw a punch.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle and Shoot are lying in wait for Cheetu. But just as Cheetu is about to approach them, he suddenly changes direction and disappears. Meanwhile, Killua and Gon sense that someone is following them again.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The assassin Ikalgo, an octopus-type Chimera Ant, attacks Killua with his Nen Abilities. Killua captures him and tells Ikalgo that he'll let him live if he divulges his ally's abilities.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 1
programme.desc: Yoshihiro Kira spots Kosaku Kawajiri and instantly recognizes that it’s actually his son, Yoshikage. Meanwhile, Josuke, Okuyasu, and Mikitaka find a strange man living in an abandoned electrical tower.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 2
programme.desc: Josuke enters the electrical tower again to save Mikitaka and defeat Toyohiro Kanedaichi. Meanwhile, Rohan receives a visit from a first-class architect named Masazo Kinoto, who’s come to estimate the repair costs to his burnt house.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 3
programme.desc: Rohan finds himself possessed by Masazo Kinoto’s Stand, Cheap Trap, who tells the manga artist to burn the photos he took of the people in Morioh. Meanwhile, Josuke and Yuya encounter the Stand user responsible for Koichi’s disappearance.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: July 15th (Thurs), Part 4
programme.desc: Rohan calls over Koichi to help him fight off Cheap Trap, which has attached itself onto Rohan’s back. Unfortunately, Koichi thinks Rohan is pulling a prank on him and leaves.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 1

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bites the Dust, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira gains a new ability called Bites the Dust, a bomb that automatically kills anyone who tries to discover Kira’s identity through Hayato. Realizing that the only people who could stop Kira are ones with similar powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Shining D (Diamond) is Unbreakable, Part 1
programme.desc: Hayato’s attempt to kill Kira using Stray Cat’s air bullet ends in failure. Kira realizes that letting Hayato repeat the same morning is becoming a risk, so he decides to undo Bites the Dust after he sees through Rohan’s death.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams are in Liverpool, England, where they experience a once-in-a-lifetime shoot-out at the historic Anfield Stadium, home of the Liverpool FC.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million prize on the line, the final teams race through Las Vegas, where the world's greatest illusionist, David Copperfield, designs a final challenge that requires the remaining teams to master the art of illusion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven teams take off from Los Angeles, California on race around the world, starting with a stop in Valparaiso, Chile, where a high-wire walk Roadblock tests the mettle of several racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The ten remaining teams depart Palacio Baburizza in Valparaiso, Chile, taking a lengthy bus trip to Puerto Varas.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Gruta de la Virgen in Puerto Varas, Chile for Bariloche, Argentina.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams depart the Pit Stop at Estancia Fortin Chacabuco in Bariloche, Argentina for Hamburg, Germany.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The eight remaining teams are transported from the Pit Stop at the Indra Club in Hamburg, Germany's red-light district to a mystery location in France.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The seven remaining teams drive from the Pit Stop at the Church of Massiges in Verdun, France to Reims.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The six remaining teams depart the Pit Stop in Champagne Ardenne, France and fly to the Seychelles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a victim is gunned down at point-blank range, police often assume that a friend or acquaintance is to blame.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In North Carolina, the home of a prominent couple becomes an unlikely scene of terrible bloodshed. Across the country, a California woman vanishes, worrying her family and the investigators trying to find her.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The Great Outdoors may offer great clues to solving brutal murders. But it takes the keen eye of the forensic entomologist and botanist to decipher the clues nature provides.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder…at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los integrantes del grupo tienen entrevistas con Deanna, la jefa de Alexandria, y esperan en las casas que les asignan a saber si son aceptados o rechazados. Cuando conocen a los habitantes de la comunidad, perciben que no están bien entrenados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Daryl y Carol se reúnen en secreto para planear cómo recuperar sus armas del arsenal de Alexandria, ya que temen que, si algo sale mal, van a necesitarlas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol le sugiere a Rick que deben asesinar a Pete porque es violento con su esposa e hijo. Por otra parte, Gabriel advierte a Deanna que desconfíe del grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna y Rick se culpan mutuamente de las muertes de Aidenn y Noah. Rick le ofrece a Jessie protección ante Pete, pero este lo descubre y se enzarza en una pelea con él. La tensión en Alexandria aumenta y algo terrible se avecina.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna quiere expulsar al grupo de Rick de Alexandria y ellos se preparan para defenderse. Sin embargo, la llegada de una banda de asaltantes y la irrupción de una horda de zombis interrumpen el enfrentamiento entre los dos bandos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Morgan encuentran una horda descomunal de zombis en una cantera cercana a Alexandria. Entretanto, Carter convoca a varios habitantes de Alexandria para proponerles un plan: matar a Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Lobos, el grupo con el que ya habían combatido, asalta Alexandria y empieza a acuchillar a sus ciudadanos por las calles. Durante la pelea, Enid huye de Alexandria y Ron rechaza la ayuda de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo trata de reconducir a la horda de zombis para alejarla de Alexandria, pero el plan falla y Glenn y Nicholas terminan rodeados por muertos vivientes. Rick, por su parte, es atacado por los asaltantes que Morgan expulsó de Alexandria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Morgan le explica a un asaltante al que mantiene cautivo cómo venció a la ira que le consumía y aprendió que el camino correcto es aquel que rechaza la violencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick regresa a Alexandria, donde el ánimo está decaído por la presencia de la horda de zombis y las secuelas del asalto sufrido. Maggie y Aaron salen en busca de Glenn. Denise pierde la confianza en sí misma, pero Tara la anima.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ahora que los caminantes han traspasado las barreras de Alexandría, Rick y los otros sobrevivientes deben seguir luchando para mantenerse a salvo e intentar no perder la esperanza.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James T. West is blamed for an impending international crisis when a quantity of priceless 'franconium,' a substance of fantastic power and owned by France, is stolen from under his nose at the French Consulate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West fights off an unprovoked knife-wielding assailant and then meets a beautiful blonde named Marie.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. agent James T. West enlists in a secret army of fanatics whose demented leader is plotting to overthrow United States Army units stationed in the Southwest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon go after Dr. Cadwallader, demented geologist who is systematically devastating the state of Wyoming with man-made earthquakes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Gov. Bradford and his secretary, Miss Piecemeal, watch as the governor's statue is unveiled during a private showing at the Bolt Museum. Suddenly, the statue blinks, and Bradford, immobilized by an injection, is taken prisoner.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. secret agent James T. West is lured into a hospital where he is gassed and carried out in a coffin by the weird, zombie-like aides of one Dr. Arcularis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a notorious desperado, Frank Slade, inaplan to arrest a Mexican bandit, Colonel Vasquez, who has been robbing banks in American border towns and then fleeing to the sanctuary of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Iron Man Torres strangles a shop owner named Gilbert as secret agent James T. West passes by.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The multi-angled roof has been framed. A remote-controlled skylight is installed. Mini duct system is discussed. The homeowner's mother makes a glass mosaic table. Rotted wood gutter is replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: New material is used for the house's exterior trim. Kevin visits a window restoration shop. Radiant floor heating is installed in the garage. The homeowners tile the basement bathroom.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin learns how subway trains are serviced then helps a homeowner paint kitchen cabinets. Roger teaches how to estimate landscape material by the cubic yard. Richard installs a smart thermostat to reduce energy use.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin teaches the guys how to use Twitter. Tom replaces an old, rusted bulkhead door. And the guys ask "What Is It?" Richard discusses several ways to get hot water without waiting.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger builds a garden bed for chile pepper plants in New Mexico. Richard repairs a leaky toilet with a worn out flange. And the guys ask "What Is It?" Where to find it?

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard replaces a leaking kitchen faucet with a hands-free model. Kevin explains rechargeable batteries. The guys ask WHAT IS IT? and Roger installs a drain in a driveway to divert rainwater.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs a new, pre-hung front door. Richard discusses an important water heater safety device. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Roger shows how to use big containers for screening and shading.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin visits Santa Fe and installs a shade sail over a deck. Roger shows the proper way to use a wheelbarrow. And Richard installs a hybrid water heater that saves energy.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Kevin replace a leaky skylight. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard repairs a noisy toilet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger and a homeowner plant a red maple tree. Richard heads to Indianapolis to begin work on a new master bathroom in a basement. And the guys ask What Is It?

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a safe room for tornado protection. Tom tests hurricane windows. Kevin installs a standby generator. Meteorologist Jim Cantore shares insights on preparing for weather.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom demonstrates many uses for a wood router. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard replaces an air conditioning unit that freezes when it runs.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a desert-climate irrigation system. Richard installs a new style of heat-pump water heater. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom shares a tip about re-using a garden hose reel.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom heads to Seattle to install crown molding. Roger replaces a rotted fence post. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Kevin explains the difference between cement, concrete, and mortar.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The roof gets different types of underlayment. An oak mantle is installed. Brickwork is corrected. The old boiler is disassembled. Exterior clapboards are painted inside. A linear drain is installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A composite deck is installed. The basement gets insulated. Unconventional HVAC zoning is discussed. Kevin tours a stove factory in Reading, PA. Solar panels and their backup system are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The master bathroom gets a plaster treatment. Windowsills are replicated in Dracut, MA. A kitchen garden, recessed lighting, and floating countertop are installed. New wood floors change directions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1880s Country Cape is finished. The cast arrives and reflects on the changes that have been made since Charlie's crew started work. The homeowners take Kevin and Tommy on a tour of the house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: It's a new project. We meet a new builder Deliandro and homeowners Robyn and Derek in the West Roxbury section of Boston. Robyn gives a tour. Derek is an architect and drew the construction plans.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The inside is demo'ed. Beams are installed to replace a load-bearing wall. A willow is pruned, and house wrap is installed. The homeowners select kitchen cabinets. A wider window opening is created.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Outside, windows are trimmed with PVC, and the house gets sided with fiber cement clapboards. An American Elm resistant to Dutch Elm disease is planted. Inside, a drainpipe puzzle is solved.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Ipe is installed on the front porch. A heat pump coil is added to the existing furnace. Back at the house, a brick patio is built. At the Dracut Centre School, original corbel replicas are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The old front steps are replaced. The homeowners decide on interior flooring. Kevin visits a trade school. Cable railing and new door are installed out back, and a brick walkway out front.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Lighting is being installed outside and preparation for in-floor heat is happening in the primary bathroom. The homeowners pick lighting for the dining room and father and son install drywall.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The original foundation is repaired. Antique windows are installed in Dracut, MA. The wood floors are patched, and a bathroom is prepped for tile. Aluminum gutters that look like wood are explored.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Cabinets and a vent hood are being installed in the kitchen. The homeowners' daughter chooses a paint color for her room. A stained glass window is repaired, and floor tiles are laid out for install.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a whole-house humidifier. Kevin and Scott install hardwired smoke and carbon monoxide detectors. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom shows how to remove stripped screws.

programme.title: Oscar Valdez vs Miguel Berchelt
programme.desc: On February 20th, 2021 Oscar Valdez and Miguel Berchelt faced eachother for the WBC World Super Featherweight title during "The Bubble" at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas with Berchelt going down three times Valdez scared the win in the 10th round.

programme.title: Oscar Valdez vs Scott Quigg
programme.desc: On March 10th, 2018, Oscar Valdez and Scott Quigg fought for the WBO World Featherweight Championship in Carson, CA. Oscar Valdez defeated Scott Quigg by unanimous decision in a thrilling fight, showcasing his superior skills and resilience.

programme.title: Paulie Ayala vs Johnny Tapia 1
programme.desc: On June 26th, 1999, Paulie Ayala fought Johnny Tapia for the WBA Bantamweight Title at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. In what was the 1999 Ring Magazine Fight of the Year, the two men put on a show that ended with an Ayala unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Randall Bailey vs Mike Jones
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2012 Randall Bailey and Mike Jones fought for vacant IBF World welterweight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas that ended in the 11th round by knockout resulting in a victory for Bailey.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Arturo Frias
programme.desc: On May 8th, 1982 Ray Mancini and Arturo Frias fought for the WBA World Lightweight title at the Aladdin in Las Vegas with what was supposed to be a 15 round bout ending in the first by technical knockout securing the victory for Ray Mancini.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Orlando Romero
programme.desc: On September 15th, 1983 Ray Mancini fought Orlando Romero for the WBA World Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York with the bout ending in the ninth round by knockout earning Mancini the win.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Bert Cooper
programme.desc: On August 5th, 1990 Ray Mercer faced Bert Cooper for Heavyweight titles at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City with the bout ending by unanimous decision in favor of Mercer.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Tommy Morrison
programme.desc: On October 18th, 1991 Ray Mercer faced Tommy Morrison for the WBO World Heavyweight titles at the Convention Center in Atlantic City ending in technical knockout by Mercer earning him the victory and title but, he relinquished the title shortly after.

programme.title: Rob Brant vs Ryota Murata 1
programme.desc: On October 20th, 2018 Rob Brant faced Ryota Murata for a second time for the WBA World Middleweight title at the Park Theater in Las Vegas that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Brant.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Abraham Nova
programme.desc: On June 18th, 2022, Robeisy Ramirez and Abraham Nova fought for the IBF USBA & WBO Global Featherweight titles at Madison Square Garden resulting in a knockout victory for Robeisy Ramirez.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Brandon Valdes
programme.desc: On December 12th, 2020, Robeisy Ramirez fought Brandon Valdes in a featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Ramirez showed his impressive speed and natural power, stopping Valdes in the sixth round.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Davey Moore
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1983 Roberto Duran fought Davey Moore for the WBA World Super welterweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York Moore was knocked down in the 7th round giving the win to Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 24th, 1989, Roberto Duran fought Iran Barkley for the WBC Middleweight Title in Atlantic City. Duran, known for his relentless aggression, defeated Barkley by a close split decision in what was named The Ring Fight of the Year for 1989.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Jimmy Batten
programme.desc: On November 12th, 1982 Roberto Duran faced Jimmy Batten at the Orange Bowl in Miami, Fl. It ended in an unanimous decision victory for Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Sugar Ray Leonard 1
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1989 Roberto Duran and Sugar Ray Leonard fought for the first time for the WBC World Super Middleweight at the Mirage Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Leonard.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Because of a termite problem at Duck Commander, the guys are forced to find a different location to work from--Godwin's House. But while at Godwin's house, Godwin gets a taxidermied gift from a past relative.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: John Luke and Sadie are getting some dental work done, complete with sedation, and it's up to Willie and Korie to take care of them through the process--including getting them back home safely.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Si shows up to work on a mobility scooter, claiming to have an invisible injury from a fender bender with Willie. After losing her beloved turtle "Mr. T", Ms.Kay enlists Phil on a mission to find a new pet turtle.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: A decision to try and make some duck jerky leads the boys to Godwin's garage and a minibike race. Phil and Kay have made Willie the executor of their will, and Phil wants to show Willie what he and his brothers will inherit when he and Kay pass away.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: Si discovers Youtube, and, after watching a series of instructional videos, decides he can make something better. John Luke totals Willie's truck, and Willie realizes he may be raising the two worst drivers in all of Louisiana.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons host a Halloween event at Duck Commander, where they all come together to transform the warehouse into a "scarehouse." Everyone dresses up and Willie desperately tries to be the scariest, but none of the kids are afraid of him.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertsons perform a live nativity for their Church for Christmas, so the wives organize rehearsals to ensure that they pull off a great event. However, rehearsals get off to a bumpy start as the guys can't stop sharing their opinions.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Rebecca returns home from her internship in Los Angeles, the Robertson family plans a big surprise party to welcome her back. Meanwhile, when Uncle Si gets sick, he seeks the help of Ms. Kay to take care of him.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The Ice Road Truckers form a convoy for the first time ever to take on a most dangerous mission: as rising temps turn the ice road to Nuiqsut back into a river, they must cross the softening ice to deliver critical supplies.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: When a Haul Road legend dies, Ray leads the trucker's son to scatter his ashes on Atigun. But the son's blunders on the Dalton could get them killed before they make it.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
